description: Canonical slot names for Aethon layouts. A composite that carries `slot: "<name>"` lands in the grid cell whose area matches the slot name (or, if the layout supplies a `slotMap` prop, the area the map points the slot to). Layouts that want to host the standard composites must use these slot names.

header.description: Top chrome bar — typically hosts brand mark, status, navigation.

sidebar.description: Left navigation panel with skills/models/themes/history. Typically toggleable via /sidebar.

files-sidebar.description: Right panel hosting the project file tree. Toggleable via /layout/filesSidebarVisible.

tabs.description: Horizontal tab strip for switching between agent sessions.

canvas.description: Main content area — renders chat history, agent-emitted A2UI, and tool cards. Shared with `empty-state` slot.

terminal.description: Optional terminal panel for bash output. Toggleable via /terminal.

composer.description: User input area — chat input box with send/stop button.

status.description: Bottom status bar — typically left/center/right text segments.

empty-state.description: Composite shown when no tabs are open. Conventionally lives in the same grid area as `canvas`, toggled via `/empty` and `/hasTabs`.
